title: Mobile user has few headsets, some disconnected
scenario: Lens tenant Inventory and user profile pages correctly reflect active (green) and disconnected (red) status for 3+ paired headsets
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens tenant web portal and navigate to the Inventory page.
2. Pair 3 or more Poly Bluetooth headsets to a mobile device running the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Ensure at least one headset remains powered on and connected (active).
4. Turn off or unpair at least one of the other headsets so it becomes disconnected.
5. On the Inventory page, observe the status indicator for each headset.
6. Navigate to the Inventory/Device Profile page for each headset and observe the status indicator.
7. Navigate to the Device Users/User Profile page and observe the status indicator for each headset associated with the user.
expected: Active headsets show green marks, disconnected headsets show red/inactive marks on the Inventory page, Inventory/Device Profile page, and Device Users/User Profile page.
